source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/05_해외 등록 서류 (영업팀 F-up)/260123 태국 Hollywood, 23G 및 P1 등록서류 - 이창민 팀장님/1.1 [Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector] Check list & DoC/11. Safety Declaration.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: H&abyz Co., Ltd. declares no global safety issues for Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector models A1417MCW, A1717MCW, and F1417MCW for a Thai FDA medical device application.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Submitted to the Medical Devices Control Division, Thai Food and Drug Administration, Ministry of Public Health as a safety declaration for the stated medical devices.
keyPoints: The declaration covers the period from 31/01/2025 to 31/12/2025.
The Product Owner declares no reported deaths associated with intended use.
The Product Owner declares no reported serious deterioration in health associated with intended use.
The Product Owner declares no open field safety corrective actions, including recalls, at application submission.
The declaration references offences and registration consequences under the Medical Device Act (B.E.2551), Medical Device Act (2nd edition B.E.2562), and other applicable laws.

entities.name: H&abyz Co., Ltd.
entities.evidence: I, H&abyz Co., Ltd., as the Product Owner

entities.name: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector
entities.evidence: Product Name Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

concepts.name: Serious deterioration in the state of health
concepts.evidence: Serious deterioration in the state of health, in relation to a person means: (a) a life-threatening illness or injury suffered by that person; (b) a permanent impairment of a bodily function of that person; (c) any permanent damage to any part of that person’s body; or (d) a condition requiring medical or surgical intervention

concepts.name: Field safety corrective actions
concepts.evidence: No open field safety corrective actions (including recalls) at the point of submission of this application.

evidence.claim: The document is titled Safety Declaration.
The declaration is addressed to the Medical Devices Control Division, Thai Food and Drug Administration, Ministry of Public Health.
evidence.evidenceText: Medical Devices Control Division Thai Food and Drug Administration Ministry of Public Health

evidence.claim: H&abyz Co., Ltd. is identified as the Product Owner.
evidence.evidenceText: I, H&abyz Co., Ltd., as the Product Owner

evidence.claim: The product name is Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
evidence.evidenceText: Product Name Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

evidence.claim: The stated model names are A1417MCW, A1717MCW, and F1417MCW.
evidence.pageTarget: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector Models

evidence.claim: The Product Owner declares no safety issues globally when the devices are used as intended during the stated period.
evidence.evidenceText: there are no safety issues globally associated with the use of the medical device( s) when used as intended by the Product Owner, in the last one year from 31/01/2025 to 31/12/2025

evidence.claim: The declaration states there were no reported deaths.
The declaration states there was no reported serious deterioration in the state of health of any person.
evidence.evidenceText: No reported serious deterioration in the state of health 1 of any person

evidence.claim: The declaration states there were no open field safety corrective actions, including recalls, at application submission.
evidence.evidenceText: No open field safety corrective actions (including recalls) at the point of submission of this application.

evidence.claim: The Product Owner acknowledges that false declarations may be an offence under Thai medical device laws.
evidence.evidenceText: making a declaration which I know to be false is an offence under the Medical Device Act (B.E.2551), Medical Device Act (2nd edition B.E.2562) and other applicable laws

evidence.claim: Non-compliance with registration conditions may result in suspension or cancellation of medical device registration.
evidence.evidenceText: any non-compliance with any registration condition issued by the Thai Food and Drug Administration in relation to medical devices registered with the Medical Device Control Division may result in the suspension or cancellation of the medical devices registration.
